case_title: MARVIN E. SAAVEDRA VS. RAMONA ALLBRIGHT ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SAAVEDRA, MARVIN E. AS TO DEFENDANT ALLBRIGHT, RAMONA WHITE, KEIRAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED SEP-08-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALLBRIGHT, RAMONA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAAVEDRA, MARVIN E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLBRIGHT, RAMONA AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST KIERAN KEANEY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS AN IMPROPER PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-11-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MARVIN E. SAAVEDRA AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE KIERAN KEANEY, MAINTAINANCE WORKER FOR DEFENDANT RAMONA ALLBRIGHT, WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAY'S HEARING. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KEIRAN WHITE. PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMONA ALLBRIGHT WAS FILED ON 9/11/17, LESS THEN THE FIVE DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 116.340(4)(C). MS. ALLBRIGHT'S REPRESENTATIVE DOES NOT WAIVE THIS REQUIREMENT. NO FURTHER NOTICE FOR DEFENDANT ALLBRIGHT IS REQUIRED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KEIRAN WHITE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (IFP: $0.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAAVEDRA, MARVIN E. AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE, KEIRAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MARVIN SAAVEDRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAMONA ALLBRIGHT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KIERAN KEANEY, MAINTENANCE MAN. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THE CLAIM AGAINST KIERAN KEANEY SUED AS KIERAN WHITE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS AN IMPROPER PARTY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAAVEDRA, MARVIN E. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
